fields.acceptance_criteria: Add optional author/user identifier to each history revision entry in ticket-api; RevisionEvent struct gains author: Option<String> field; CLI update/close/cancel commands accept --author <str> flag or read from TICKET_AUTHOR env var; ticket-http write endpoints forward authenticated user identity as author; GET /api/tickets/{id}/history response includes author per revision; backward compatible: existing history entries without author show as null/unknown; author stored in history.ndjson per revision
fields.title: API: Add author field to ticket history revisions in ticket-api
